case intro.intro.h
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixFinal n F inst✝ α
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
R :
  @MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b) →
    @MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b) → Prop
h_bisim : @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b) R
h_R : R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
R' : Cofix F α → Cofix F α → Prop :=
  failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
s : @MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a
t : @MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b
hR : R (Sum.inl s) (Sum.inr t)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts: apply Coalg.toCofix_ofCofix

refine ⟨R, ?_, hR⟩
      intro x y hxy
      rcases x with ⟨x | x⟩ <;> rcases y with ⟨y | y⟩
      · intro hx
        cases hx
      · intro hx
        have := h_bisim x y hx
        simpa [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest, Coalg.dest', Coalg.union._match_1] using this
      · intro hx
        cases hx
      · intro hx
        cases hx

refine ⟨fun x y => R (.inl x) (.inr y), ?_, hR⟩
      · intro x y hxy
        have := h_bisim _ _ hxy
        simpa [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest, Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.corec] using this

classical
      have hstep : LiftR (RelLast _ R) (a.dest' s) (b.dest' t) := by
        have := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
        simpa [Coalg.union] using this
      rw [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      simpa [MvQPF.liftR_iff] using hstep

classical
      refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
    · refine ⟨a.s, b.s, h_R, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨.inl s, .inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨(.inl s), (.inr t), hR, rfl, rfl⟩

classical
      refine ⟨(fun x y => ∃ (s : (a.union b).σ) (t : (a.union b).σ),
        R s t ∧ x = Cofix.corec (a.union b).dest' s ∧ y = Cofix.corec (a.union b).dest' t),
        ?_, ?_⟩
      · rintro x y ⟨sx, sy, hRS, rfl, rfl⟩
        have := h_bisim sx sy hRS
        simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union, Cofix.dest_corec] using this
      · refine ⟨.inl s, .inr t, hR, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> rfl
apply Coalg.IsBisim (self := a.union b) R |>.1 h_bisim _ _ hR
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨R, ?_, hR⟩
      intro x y hxy
      simpa [Coalg.union, Coalg.toCofix] using h_bisim x y hxy
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨(.inl s), (.inr t), hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨R, ?_, hR⟩
      intro u v huv
      have := h_bisim _ _ huv
      simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] using this

refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rfl
      · rfl

refine ⟨(fun x y => ∃ u v, R u v ∧ x = Coalg.toCofix { a.union b with s := u } ∧ y = Coalg.toCofix { a.union b with s := v }), ?_, ?_⟩
      · rintro x y ⟨u, v, hRuv, rfl, rfl⟩
        have hstep := h_bisim u v hRuv
        simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec] using hstep
      · exact ⟨.inl s, .inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨fun x y => R (.inl x) (.inr y), ?_, hR⟩
      · intro x y hxy
        simpa [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.dest,
          Cofix.dest_corec] using h_bisim x y hxy
refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨R, ?_, hR⟩
      intro x y hxy
      exact h_bisim x y hxy

classical
      refine ⟨(fun x y => ∃ (u : a.σ) (v : b.σ), R (.inl u) (.inr v) ∧ x = Coalg.toCofix { a with s := u } ∧ y = Coalg.toCofix { b with s := v }), ?_, ?_⟩
      · intro x y hxy
        rcases hxy with ⟨u, v, huv, rfl, rfl⟩
        have := h_bisim _ _ huv
        have hx : Coalg.toCofix { a with s := u } =
            Cofix.corec Cofix.dest (Coalg.toCofix { a with s := u }) := by
          simp [Coalg.toCofix]
        have hy : Coalg.toCofix { b with s := v } =
            Cofix.corec Cofix.dest (Coalg.toCofix { b with s := v }) := by
          simp [Coalg.toCofix]
        subst hx; subst hy
        rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
        simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] using this
      · exact ⟨s, t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
refine ⟨.inl s, .inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨fun u v => R (.inl u) (.inr v), ?_, hR⟩
      · intro u v huv
        have := h_bisim (.inl u) (.inr v) huv
        simpa [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, RelLast, RelLast, Function.comp] using this

refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
      rintro _ _ hs ht
      simpa [R'] using ⟨s, t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩

refine ⟨Sum.inl s, Sum.inr t, hR, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rfl
      · rfl
exact ⟨s, t, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
